title: BarCraft Wine Bottle Stopper with Flip Top Ring Pull, Stainless Steel, 8.5 cm
availability_text: Only 15 left in stock (more on the way).
features: KEEP WINE FRESH: Savour the flavours and aromas another day - this wine saver keeps unfinished red, white and rosé tastier for longer
FITS ANY STANDARD BOTTLE: Slot it in any regular 750 ml bottle, and its locking mechanism will create an airtight seal
REMOVE WITH EASE: Pull the ring up to open it, push it down to seal the bottle up - simple
DURABLE: The bottle stopper is made of rust resistant stainless steel, so you can rely on it again and again
description: From the manufacturer BarCraft Stainless Steel Wine Bottle Saver / Preserver with Flip Top Ring Pull Useful Information: Measures 8.5 x 4 cm (3 x 1.5 inches) Designed to fit standard 750 ml wine bottles Hand-wash only Keep your wine fresh and full of flavour for longer Just because you've opened a bottle of your favourite wine, it doesn't mean you have to drink it all in one sitting, as tempting as that is... Instead use this elegant wine bottle stopper to preserve your unfinished reds, whites and rosés for another time. This wine saver's flip top mechanism is designed to fit most standard 750 ml wine bottles. Simple pop it in and push down the ring to create an airtight lock. This helps to reduce oxidisation, keeping those delightful flavours and aromas intact for longer. A Superb Stocking Filler Any avid dinner party host or wine lover is sure to get good use out of this wine bottle saver. Why not pop in their Christmas stocking, or gift it alongside a bottle of their favourite wine? About BarCraft BarCraft is KitchenCraft's barware brand. This stylish, innovative collection is made up of dozens of tools and accessories - enough to satisfy all drinking preferences and occasions. With everything from shakers to strainers, muddlers to jiggers, it's easy to craft the perfect concoction for a glamorous cocktail evening. Or why not savour the sophisticated notes of a vintage wine with BarCraft's aerators, filters and chillers? Whatever your tipple of choice, BarCraft helps you enjoy every moment.
